sqlMap.select: select * from computerule where propertyno = #propertyno# and propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.insert: insert into computerule(propertyno, propertyversionno, metaobjectno, structureno name expression event eval description executionseq ) values (#propertyno:NUMERIC#, #propertyversionno:NUMERIC#, #metaobjectno:NUMERIC#, #structureno:NUMERIC# #name# #expression# #event# #eval# #description# #executionseq# ) SELECT IDENT_CURRENT('computerule') as last_insert_id
sqlMap.select: select computeruleno, name, expression, event, eval, description, executionseq, propertyno, propertyversionno, metaobjectno, structureno from computerule where computeruleno = #computeruleno# and propertyno = #propertyno# and propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.update:
update computerule set
name = #name# name = null expression = #expression# expression = null event = #event# event = null eval = #eval# eval = null description = #description# description = null executionseq = #executionseq# executionseq = null
where computeruleno = #computeruleno# and propertyno = #propertyno# and propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.delete: delete from computerule where computeruleno = #computeruleno# and propertyno = #propertyno# and propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
delete from computerule where propertyno = #propertyno# and propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.select: select computeruleno, name, expression, event, eval, description, executionseq, propertyno, propertyversionno, metaobjectno, structureno from computerule where computeruleno = #computeruleno# and propertyno = #propertyno# and propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#

select computeruleno, propertyno, propertyversionno, metaobjectno, structureno, name, expression, event, eval, description, executionseq from computerule where propertyno = #propertyno# and propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
